sections.paragraph:
verb לחבור

to join, combine; unite; heal

verb לחבר

to add; join, combine; bind; compose, write

verb חובר (>>חֻבַּר)

be joined; added; bound; composed, written

verb להתחבר

to associate; join; composed, written

verb לחבר (>>חיבר)

to add; join, combine; bind; compose, write

masculine noun

friend, comrade, pal, mate, buddy, crony, amigo, johnnie, johnny, feller, peer, compeer, messmate; boyfriend; member, fellow

masculine noun

league, band, body, company, staff; gang
